expect: MS-ARMA with 2-3 regimes will reduce OOS RMSE from 0.397 to <0.15. Era-specific phi_1 values will correspond to developmental phases. Falsified if MS-ARMA fails to beat AR(1) OOS (0.148).
actual: DEEPER FINDING: long memory itself was a LEVEL-SHIFT ARTIFACT. 10-micro-era demeaning reduces ACF plateau from 0.377 to 0.063 (83% reduction). Within any era after Era 1, phi_1 ≈ 0. Regime-switching is unnecessary because the underlying process is i.i.d. within eras — the apparent persistence was Simpson's paradox applied to time series.
diff: Expected regime-switching to improve OOS: WRONG QUESTION. The phenomenon being modeled (ACF plateau) was not genuine long memory but aggregation artifact. 6+ sessions of model fitting (L-1491→L-1569) were modeling an illusion.
